## Commit messages

**CRITICAL**: Do NOT execute git commits yourself. This file is ONLY for formatting the commit messages that the USER will run. See `.agents/rules/GEMINI.md` for execution discipline.

Use Conventional Commits format: `type(scope): subject`

Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore

- Imperative mood, present tense ("Add" not "Added")
- Subject under 70 characters, no period at the end
- Body explains what and why, not how
- Reference GitHub issues as `Fixes #123` or `Refs #123` when relevant
